MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS METRO CAB COMPANY and LIWEN LI'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-07-463546, CGC-07-466072 WITH CASE CGC-07-466348 is granted.
